title: Appointment access and booking
content: Use this reference when a resident asks about booking, waiting time, online scheduling, or trouble reaching a clinic.
moderator_hint: A helpful reply should point to booking channels or contact steps rather than offering medical advice.

title: Chronic disease management
content: Use this reference when the message involves blood pressure, medication routines, dizziness, or disease-monitoring questions.
moderator_hint: A helpful reply should encourage appropriate follow-up with a clinician rather than adjusting medication directly.

title: Lifestyle and behavior change
content: Use this reference when the message is about exercise, healthy eating, weight management, or daily routines.
moderator_hint: A helpful reply can suggest simple next steps and realistic behavior changes.

title: Insurance and payment questions
content: Use this reference when the resident asks about reimbursement, coverage, bills, payment options, or insurance paperwork.
moderator_hint: A helpful reply should direct the resident to financial or administrative support resources.
